languages.text: "...предвестники великого голода, ройного вида, отличающегося впечатляющим контролем над своими особями и изумительной примитивностью инстинктов и целей. В регионе этот вид почти не представлен, за исключением одной ветви, проникнувшей в местные системы из-за варп-штормов, отделяющих регион от более населенного Человечеством сектора".

traits.locale_text: "Предвестники великого голода, ройной цивилизации, отличающейся впечатляющим контролем над своими особями и изумительной примитивностью инстинктов и целей. В регионе этот вид почти не представлен, за исключением одной ветви, проникнувшей в местные системы из-за варп-штормов, отделяющих регион от более населенного Человечеством сектора".

languages.text: "...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."
languages.original_text: "...предвестники великого голода, ройного вида, отличающегося впечатляющим контролем над своими особями и изумительной примитивностью инстинктов и целей. В регионе этот вид почти не представлен, за исключением одной ветви, проникнувшей в местные системы из-за варп-штормов, отделяющих регион от более населенного Человечеством сектора".

traits.locale_text: "...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

"Harbingers of great hunger, a swarming civilisation notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

"Harbingers of great hunger, a swarming civilisation notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

"...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

languages.text: “……大饥饿的先驱。一种蜂群，对成员的控制力极强，其本能和意图都原始得令人咋舌。本区域几乎没有这个物种的存在，但在亚空间风暴将本区域与人口更稠密的人类星区隔开后，有一支分支渗透进了当地星系。”
languages.original_text: "...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

traits.locale_text: “……大饥饿的先驱。一种蜂群，对成员的控制力极强，其本能和意图都原始得令人咋舌。本区域几乎没有这个物种的存在，但在亚空间风暴将本区域与人口更稠密的人类星区隔开后，有一支分支渗透进了当地星系。”

languages.text: «... heraldos de una gran hambre, una especie enjambre notable por su impresionante control sobre cada individuo y su primitiva combinación de instinto y propósito. La especie apenas tiene representación en la región, a excepción de una rama solitaria que se ha infiltrado en los sistemas locales debido a las tormentas de disformidad que separan la región más poblada por humanos del sector del resto».
languages.original_text: "...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

traits.locale_text: «... heraldos de una gran hambre, una especie enjambre notable por su impresionante control sobre cada individuo y su primitiva combinación de instinto y propósito. La especie apenas tiene representación en la región, a excepción de una rama solitaria que se ha infiltrado en los sistemas locales debido a las tormentas de disformidad que separan la región más poblada por humanos del sector del resto».

languages.text: « ... annonciatrice d'une grande famine, cette espèce fourmillante est notable pour le contrôle impressionnant qu'elle exerçait sur ses membres et le caractère primitif de ses instincts et de ses entreprises. Elle est très peu présente dans la région, à l'exception d'une branche unique qui a infiltré les systèmes locaux en raison des tempêtes Warp séparant la région du secteur plus densément peuplé par les humains. »
languages.original_text: "...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

traits.locale_text: « ... annonciatrice d'une grande famine, cette espèce fourmillante est notable pour le contrôle impressionnant qu'elle exerçait sur ses membres et le caractère primitif de ses instincts et de ses entreprises. Elle est très peu présente dans la région, à l'exception d'une branche unique qui a infiltré les systèmes locaux en raison des tempêtes Warp séparant la région du secteur plus densément peuplé par les humains. »

languages.text: "Büyük açlığın habercileri. Mensupları üzerindeki etkileyici kontrolleri, içgüdülerinin ve amaçlarının şaşırtıcı ilkelliğiyle dikkat çeken, sürü hâlinde yaşayan bir tür. Bu tür, bölgeyi insanların daha yoğun olarak yaşadığı sektörden ayıran öteboyut fırtınaları nedeniyle yerel sistemlere sızan tek bir kol haricinde bölgede neredeyse hiç temsil edilmiyor."
languages.original_text: "...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

traits.locale_text: "Büyük açlığın habercileri. Mensupları üzerindeki etkileyici kontrolleri, içgüdülerinin ve amaçlarının şaşırtıcı ilkelliğiyle dikkat çeken, sürü hâlinde yaşayan bir tür. Bu tür, bölgeyi insanların daha yoğun olarak yaşadığı sektörden ayıran öteboyut fırtınaları nedeniyle yerel sistemlere sızan tek bir kol haricinde bölgede neredeyse hiç temsil edilmiyor."

languages.text: "Vorboten großen Hungers, eine schwärmende Spezies, die für ihre bemerkenswerte Kontrolle ihrer Mitglieder und die erstaunliche Primitivität ihrer Instinkte bekannt ist. Die Spezies ist in der Region kaum vertreten, von einem Zweig abgesehen, der einige örtliche Systeme infiltrieren konnte, da Warpstürme die Region von mit Menschen dichter besiedelten Sektoren trennen."
languages.original_text: "...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

traits.locale_text: "Vorboten großen Hungers, eine schwärmende Spezies, die für ihre bemerkenswerte Kontrolle ihrer Mitglieder und die erstaunliche Primitivität ihrer Instinkte bekannt ist. Die Spezies ist in der Region kaum vertreten, von einem Zweig abgesehen, der einige örtliche Systeme infiltrieren konnte, da Warpstürme die Region von mit Menschen dichter besiedelten Sektoren trennen."

languages.text: 「...大飢饉の予兆、その群れは、驚異的な統制力と、驚くほど原始的な本能と目的で知られる種です。この種は、この地域にほとんど存在しません。ただ、この地域を人々が住むより人口の多いセクターと隔離するワープストームによって、この地域に侵入した一枝だけが存在します。」
languages.original_text: "...harbingers of great hunger, a swarming species notable for its impressive control over its members and astonishing primitiveness of instinct and purpose. The species is barely represented in the region, save for a single branch that has infiltrated local systems due to warp storms separating the region from the sector more densely populated by humans."

traits.locale_text: 「...大飢饉の予兆、その群れは、驚異的な統制力と、驚くほど原始的な本能と目的で知られる種です。この種は、この地域にほとんど存在しません。ただ、この地域を人々が住むより人口の多いセクターと隔離するワープストームによって、この地域に侵入した一枝だけが存在します。」
